---
title: "Publications"
description: "A live feed of my research output, pulled automatically from Zotero. Updated every two weeks."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: all-pubs
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  template: ../_ejs/citation.ejs
  categories: true
  page-size: 100
---

::: {#all-pubs .nw-cites}
:::
